name: Rasam Powder (Rasam Podi)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup red gram dal (pigeon peas, toor dal), picked over and rinsed
4 tablespoons Bengal gram dal, picked over and rinsed (yellow split peas, channa dal)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, dry-roast all the ingredients separately until they each give off a strong aroma.
2. Do not roast the ground turmeric.
3. Place all the roasted ingredients in an electric blender or food processor.
4. Blend into a fine powder.
5. Store in an airtight container and use as required.
6. Makes 15 ounces.
